impact: Adds syntax-first exact-schema coverage for the accepted extension lifecycle skeleton and evidence map while respecting the evidence-map category-reference boundary and avoiding any implementation or automation code.
summary: Replace the malformed checkbox-19 validator with one small syntax-valid unittest for the two extension lifecycle fixtures.
target_task: Task checkbox-20: Recovery for checkbox-19: replace the malformed exact-schema validator attempt with one small Python unittest file only, loading exactly `ppd/tests/fixtures/lifecycle/extension_lifecycle_process_skeleton.json` and `ppd/tests/fixtures/lifecycle/extension_lifecycle_evidence_map.json`; before any full test run, the daemon must run py_compile on the changed file and reject syntax fragments such as bare identifiers after `assert`, malformed comparisons, generated pseudo-code, or missing assertion operators.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
